operations.title: Administration
operations.subtitle: Powerful tools to manage and transform your budget data across different years and columns.

cards.freezeDesc: Lock budget columns or headcount metrics for a specific year
cards.copyBudgetDesc: Copy budget data between years and columns with optional percentage adjustments
cards.copyAllocDesc: Copy allocation methods and percentages from one year to another
cards.resetColumnDesc: Clear all data from a budget column for a specific year

freeze.title: Freeze / Unfreeze Data
freeze.noPermission: You need Budget Admin permissions to freeze or unfreeze data. You can still review the current freeze status below.
freeze.loadError: Failed to load freeze status. Try selecting a different year.

columnReset.title: Reset Budget Column
columnReset.subtitle: Clear all data from a budget column for a specific year
columnReset.columnFrozenError: The {{year}} {{column}} column is frozen. Unfreeze it before clearing data.
columnReset.noDataInfo: No data found in the {{column}} column for {{year}}. Nothing to clear.
columnReset.clearWarning: Warning: This operation will permanently remove all data from the {{column}} column for year {{year}}. This action cannot be undone. {{count}} items will be affected.
columnReset.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to clear all data from the {{column}} column for year {{year}}?
columnReset.confirmAffected: This will affect {{count}} items with a total value of {{value}}.
columnReset.clearSuccess:
Column cleared successfully!
Cleared: {{cleared}} items
Skipped: {{skipped}} items
Errors: {{errors}} items
columnReset.clearFailed: Clear operation failed. Please check the console for details.

copyAllocations.title: Copy Allocations
copyAllocations.subtitle: Copy allocation methods and percentages from one year to another for all OPEX items
copyAllocations.sameYearWarning: Source and destination years must be different.
copyAllocations.showingItems: Showing {{total}} items. {{toCopy}} will be copied, {{skipped}} skipped, {{errors}} errors.
copyAllocations.dryRunPrompt: Run a dry run to preview how allocation methods will be copied.
copyAllocations.skippedDueToDestination: {{count}} items already have allocations in {{year}}. Enable overwrite to replace them.
copyAllocations.summaryReady: {{processed}} items ready to copy, {{skipped}} skipped, {{errors}} errors.
copyAllocations.dryRunFailed: Dry run failed. Check the console for details.
copyAllocations.copyFailed: Copy failed. Check the console for details.

copyBudgetColumns.title: Copy Budget Columns
copyBudgetColumns.subtitle: Copy budget data between years and columns with optional percentage adjustments
copyBudgetColumns.frozenError: The {{year}} {{column}} column is frozen. Unfreeze it before copying data.
copyBudgetColumns.existingDataWarning: {{count}} items already have data in the destination column and will be skipped. Enable "Overwrite existing data" to replace them.
copyBudgetColumns.previewInfo: Preview shows all {{total}} items. {{toProcess}} items will be processed, {{skipped}} will be skipped. Items marked with [SKIP] will not be modified during copy operation.
copyBudgetColumns.copySuccess:
Copy operation completed successfully!
Processed: {{processed}} items
Skipped: {{skipped}} items
Errors: {{errors}} items
copyBudgetColumns.dryRunFailed: Dry run failed. Please check the console for details.
copyBudgetColumns.copyFailed: Copy operation failed. Please check the console for details.

currency.title: Currency Settings
currency.subtitle: Configure reporting and default currencies used across OPEX and CAPEX workflows. All values are saved as three-letter ISO codes.
currency.loadError: Failed to load current currency settings.
currency.fxSyncRunning: FX rates sync is already running in the background.
currency.fxSyncStarted: FX rates sync started for fiscal years {{years}}. Rates will update shortly.
currency.reportingCurrencyHelp: Primary currency used for reports and totals
currency.defaultOpexCurrencyHelp: Prefills currency when creating new spend items
currency.defaultCapexCurrencyHelp: Prefills currency when creating new CAPEX items
currency.allowedCurrenciesHelp: Optional comma-separated list (e.g. EUR, USD, GBP)
currency.fxRatesTitle: Latest FX Rate Snapshots (per fiscal year, tenant reporting currency basis)
currency.loadRatesError: Failed to load FX rate history.
currency.noRatesYet: No FX rate snapshots captured yet. Run "Force FX rates sync" to create one.

confirmations.unsavedNavigate: You have unsaved changes. Save before navigating?
confirmations.unsavedSwitchTab: You have unsaved changes. Save before switching tabs?
confirmations.unsavedSwitchYear: You have unsaved changes. Save before switching years?

landing.title: Reporting
landing.description: Explore prebuilt reports. Each report includes a summary table and a chart, with export options.

globalChargeback.title: Global Chargeback
globalChargeback.description: Global allocations, company totals, and KPIs

companyChargeback.title: Company Chargeback
companyChargeback.description: Zoom into a single company with department totals and items

topOpex.title: Top OPEX
topOpex.description: Largest OPEX items for a selected year (custom top N)

opexDelta.title: Top OPEX Increase/Decrease
opexDelta.description: Biggest changes vs previous year (custom top N)

budgetColumnsCompare.title: Budget Column Comparison
budgetColumnsCompare.description: Pick up to 10 year+column totals (OPEX or CAPEX)

consolidation.title: Consolidation Accounts
consolidation.description: Budget grouped by consolidation account (pie or line)

analytics.title: Analytics Categories
analytics.description: Budget grouped by analytics category (pie or line)

shared.noDataForYear: No KPI data available for the selected year.

globalChargeback.title: Global Chargeback
globalChargeback.subtitle: Global chargeback allocations, company totals, and KPIs
globalChargeback.distributionDescription: Horizontal bar chart mirroring the table totals.
globalChargeback.detailedDescription: Allocation per company and department with subtotal rows per company. Rows labelled "Common Costs" represent residual company costs without department assignment.
globalChargeback.flowsDescription: Netted payer → consumer flows by company pair; self-consumption is excluded.
globalChargeback.noFlows: No intercompany flows for the selected configuration.
globalChargeback.kpisDescription: Headcount, IT users, and turnover are sourced from company metrics for the selected year.

companyChargeback.title: Company Chargeback
companyChargeback.subtitle: Detailed chargeback allocation per company across departments, items, and KPIs
companyChargeback.selectCompanyTitle: Select a company to explore chargeback details
companyChargeback.selectCompanyDescription: Choose a company, year, and budget column to generate the detailed chargeback view. Department totals, itemised allocations, and KPIs will appear once the report runs.
companyChargeback.departmentTotalsDescription: Consolidated chargeback per department. "Common Costs" aggregates allocations without a specific department.
companyChargeback.departmentDistributionDescription: Horizontal bar chart mirroring the table totals.
companyChargeback.noDepartmentAllocations: No department-level allocations for the selected configuration.
companyChargeback.chargebackItemsDescription: Itemised spend contributing to the company chargeback, including the allocation method and share of the total amount.
companyChargeback.noChargebackItems: No chargeback items for the selected configuration.
companyChargeback.flowsDescription: Partner companies with receivables (you paid for them), payables (they paid for you), and the net total. Self-consumption excluded.
companyChargeback.noFlows: No intercompany flows for the selected configuration.
companyChargeback.kpisDescription: Headcount, IT users, and turnover sourced from company metrics for the selected year.

topOpex.title: Top OPEX
topOpex.subtitle: Largest OPEX items by selected year ({{metric}})

opexDelta.title: Top OPEX Increase / Decrease
opexDelta.subtitle: Largest variations vs previous year
opexDelta.pieAvailableHint: Pie chart available when a single direction is selected

budgetTrendOpex.title: Budget Trend (OPEX)
budgetTrendOpex.subtitle: Compare selected metrics across a year range

budgetTrendCapex.title: Budget Trend (CAPEX)
budgetTrendCapex.subtitle: Compare selected metrics across a year range

budgetColumnsCompare.title: Budget Column Comparison
budgetColumnsCompare.subtitle: Compare up to ten budget columns for OPEX or CAPEX

consolidation.title: Budget by Consolidation Account
consolidation.subtitle: Group totals by consolidation account; pie for a single year, line for multi-year range

analyticsCategory.title: Budget by Analytics Category
analyticsCategory.subtitle: Group totals by analytics category; pie for a single year, line for multi-year range
